name: tinyzkp
description: Generate and verify ZK-STARK proofs. Supports program execution, custom workloads, and batch proving.

tools.name: prove
tools.description: Generate a ZK-STARK proof for a program

tools.name: prove_status
tools.description: Check status of a prove job

tools.name: describe_program
tools.description: Get details about a built-in program

tools.name: submit_workload
tools.description: Submit a named workload for proving

tools.name: workload_status
tools.description: Check status of a workload job
